input: Which happened first: the TrustAlign skill being created or the crowdsourcing campaign being cancelled?
reference_answer: The TrustAlign skill was created on February 20, 2026, and the crowdsourcing campaign was cancelled on the same day (February 20), but the skill creation happened first during the morning design session, while the campaign was cancelled at 07:17 SAST.

input: What model does the TrustAlign Observer sub-agent run on, and why was this model chosen?
reference_answer: Claude Sonnet 4.5. It was chosen for cost efficiency since TrustAlign runs frequently (after every significant action) and doesn't need the full reasoning power of Opus.
